response:
Of course. Here are several options for the "rap new smartphone" line, categorized by the vibe you're going for.

### Option 1: Punchy & Boastful (Classic Hip-Hop)
This phone's a beast, it's top of the line,
**Crushes the benchmarks, makes the competition whine.**
A camera so sharp, it reads between the lies,
**Unlocks with a glance, sees the truth in your eyes.**

### Option 2: Smooth & Stylish (Modern Trap)
Fresh out the box, this thing's a **flex,**
**Design so clean, it's causing hex.**
Screen's a **river** of glass, so smooth to the touch,
**Runs every app faster, you need it this much.**

### Option 3: Technical & Clever
It's a **pocket supercomputer, silicon heart,**
**Machine learning brains, a work of art.**
**Neural engine humming, processing the data,**
**Leaving older models in the rearview, see ya.**

### Option 4: Straight-Up Braggadocio
Yo, check the new tech, it's a **game-changer,**
**Battery lasts forever, never a stranger.**
**Photos in the dark look brighter than day,**
This ain't just an upgrade, it's the only way.

**P.P.S. Pick your favorite couplet and drop it in the track.**
